gates.name: OWNER_GATE_N_PRODUCTION_READ_ONLY_FINGERPRINT
gates.reason: Current production schema, RLS, grants, and functions are unknown.
preconditions: credential stored only in the local environment
gates.location: repository root on an owner-controlled machine
gates.work_without_gate: All production-independent N-Q implementation and non-production rehearsal are complete.

gates.name: OWNER_GATE_N_PRODUCTION_BACKUP
gates.reason: A verified logical backup is required immediately before migration.
gates.expected_success: exit code 0, non-zero file size, SHA-256 recorded
gates.evidence_path: owner-held backup hash and size only

gates.name: OWNER_GATE_N_PRODUCTION_MIGRATION
gates.reason: Final SQL cannot be fixed until the production fingerprint diff is reviewed.
gates.command: Do not execute a migration in this package.
gates.location: production SQL execution surface after a separate approval
gates.secret_safe_check: No credential is required until a final SQL package exists.
gates.cleanup: Remove production environment variables after the approved run.

gates.name: OWNER_GATE_N_NONPRODUCTION_MANUAL_SQL
gates.reason: The gate is retained in the governance inventory, but no manual SQL was required for this run.
preconditions: A future non-production operation cannot be completed by the guarded repository runners
gates.command: Do not execute manual SQL for the completed N-Q rehearsal.
gates.location: approved non-production project only, if a future scoped gate is opened
gates.secret_safe_check: No credential or SQL Editor action is required for this run.
gates.expected_success: The guarded repository runners and invariant checks remain sufficient.
stop_conditions: scope not represented by a reviewed SQL file
gates.work_without_gate: The N-Q non-production rehearsal is complete.

gates.name: OWNER_GATE_N_CANARY_WRITE
gates.command: No canary write command is authorized in this package.
gates.expected_success: all canary success conditions in reports/post-phase-n-q/canary-plan.json
gates.cleanup: Hide canary projections and clear credentials after the run.

gates.name: OWNER_GATE_P_CAU_012_INVENTORY
gates.reason: No exact canonical source identity exists.
preconditions: official unit and board URL supplied
gates.command: Reply with one allowed decision and its identity evidence; do not run SQL.
gates.expected_success: one of MAP_TO_EXISTING_SOURCE, ADD_AS_NEW_CANONICAL_SOURCE, REJECT_AS_NON_SOURCE, NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE

gates.name: OWNER_GATE_O_PRODUCTION_PROJECTION_BINDING
gates.reason: Production scholarship provenance columns and RLS are unknown.
gates.command: Run the fingerprint diff first; no production projector command is authorized.
gates.secret_safe_check: No credential needed for local diff.
gates.expected_success: all REQUIRED_FOR_BETA and COMPATIBILITY_REQUIRED differences decided

gates.name: OWNER_GATE_Q_PUBLIC_BETA
gates.reason: Public Beta is a product and operational decision.
gates.command: No public Beta enable command is authorized in this package.
gates.expected_success: beta-go-hold checklist has no HOLD item
gates.cleanup: Use application rollback and projection hide procedure if GO is reversed.
